query:
INSERT INTO memory_context (userId, taskId, taskTitle, summary, keywords, memoryType, importance, expiresAt, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 810026, '[资源存档] L022 shadcn/ui', 'CATEGORY:UI_COMPONENT | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:110700 | LANG:TypeScript | CORE:Beautifully designed accessible React component collection using open-code distribution model — components copied as source code into projects enabling full control and AI-ready modification. STATUS:ALREADY_INTEGRATED CAPABILITIES:[open_code_distribution,composability,beautiful_defaults,AI_ready_modification,fully_customizable,CLI_tool,supports_Next.js_Vite_Remix_Astro] USAGE:[CLI] INTEGRATION_NOTES:ALREADY_IN_USE by TARGET_SYSTEM; no additional integration needed; reference for component patterns. URL:https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui', 'shadcn/ui,React组件,已集成,UI库,Tailwind,Radix UI', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810027, '[资源存档] L023 DeerFlow ByteDance', 'CATEGORY:AI_AGENT | TYPE:GITHUB_FRAMEWORK | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:46000 | LANG:Python | CORE:ByteDance open-source super-agent framework orchestrating sub-agents, memory, sandboxes to complete complex tasks (minutes to hours) with skills, tools, message gateway. CAPABILITIES:[sub_agent_orchestration,sandbox_filesystem_local_Docker,long_term_memory_system,skills_tools_Claude_Code_integration,context_engineering,InfoQuest_intelligent_search_BytePlus,hours_scale_tasks] USAGE:[DOCKER,API,CLI] INTEGRATION_NOTES:MIT commercial use; sub-agent orchestration patterns for upgrading 5-agent parallel analysis; InfoQuest search for news/research collection; long-term memory patterns for memory module upgrade. URL:https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow', 'DeerFlow,字节跳动,超级代理,子代理编排,长期记忆,InfoQuest搜索', 'workflow', 5, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810028, '[资源存档] L024 Lightpanda Browser', 'CATEGORY:BROWSER_AUTOMATION | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:AGPL-3.0 | STARS:24800 | LANG:Zig | CORE:Headless browser purpose-built for AI agents built from scratch in Zig (not Chromium/WebKit), achieving 9x less memory and 11x faster execution than Chrome with full CDP protocol support. CAPABILITIES:[9x_less_memory_than_Chrome,11x_faster_execution,instant_startup,CDP_WebSocket_Playwright_Puppeteer_compatible,V8_JavaScript_execution,DOM_manipulation,cookie_proxy_network_interception,robots.txt_compliance,Docker] USAGE:[CLI,DOCKER] INTEGRATION_NOTES:AGPL-3.0 licensing review required; replace Chrome in server-side scraping pipeline to reduce infrastructure costs ~9x; compatible with existing Playwright/Puppeteer scripts; ideal for high-frequency financial data scraping. URL:https://github.com/lightpanda-io/browser', 'Lightpanda,无头浏览器,AI代理,9倍内存优化,CDP,Playwright兼容,Zig', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810029, '[资源存档] L025 UI UX Pro Max Skill', 'CATEGORY:DESIGN_SYSTEM | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:50700 | LANG:Python | CORE:AI skill providing design system generator — AI-powered reasoning engine generating complete customized design systems (color/typography/spacing/component_spec/anti-pattern_warnings) based on project requirements. CAPABILITIES:[67_UI_styles,161_color_palettes,57_font_pairings,25_chart_types,13_tech_stacks,99_UX_guidelines,161_industry_specific_rules_FINANCE,design_system_layered_persistence,Claude_Marketplace_npm_CLI] USAGE:[SKILL_PLUGIN,NPM,CLI] INTEGRATION_NOTES:161 finance-industry-specific reasoning rules for investment platform UI; MIT unrestricted; install as Manus skill for automated design system generation; shadcn/ui support aligns with TARGET_SYSTEM stack. URL:https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill', 'UI设计系统,金融UI规则,161行业规则,shadcn兼容,设计技能,Manus技能', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810030, '[资源存档] L026 Production Agentic RAG Course', 'CATEGORY:LLM_ENGINEERING | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:5200 | LANG:Python | CORE:Seven-week structured course building production-grade RAG system from scratch — automated arXiv pipeline evolving from BM25 to hybrid retrieval to Agentic RAG with LangGraph, Telegram Bot, Langfuse monitoring. CAPABILITIES:[7_week_curriculum,automated_data_pipeline,BM25_semantic_hybrid_retrieval,complete_RAG_local_LLM,streaming_Gradio,Langfuse_production_monitoring,Redis_caching,LangGraph_Agentic_RAG,Telegram_Bot,guardrails_query_rewriting_document_scoring] USAGE:[DOCS_REF,WEB_APP,API] INTEGRATION_NOTES:RAG architecture patterns for upgrading document analysis and research report features; LangGraph Agentic RAG for analysis engine upgrade; Langfuse monitoring for TARGET_SYSTEM observability; completely free. URL:https://github.com/jamwithai/production-agentic-rag-course', 'RAG,生产级,LangGraph,Langfuse监控,混合检索,Agentic RAG,文档分析', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810031, '[资源存档] L027 Kronos Financial Foundation Model', 'CATEGORY:FINANCIAL_DATA | TYPE:GITHUB_FRAMEWORK | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:11300 | LANG:Python | CORE:First open-source foundation model for financial candlestick (K-line) data using two-stage framework: specialized OHLCV tokenizer + large autoregressive Transformer pretrained on 45+ global exchanges. CAPABILITIES:[first_open_source_financial_candlestick_foundation_model,45+_global_exchanges,decoder_only_GPT_architecture,specialized_OHLCV_tokenizer_hierarchical_discrete_tokens,unified_diverse_quant_tasks,model_zoo,KronosPredictor_simple_interface,multi_timeseries_batch_prediction,custom_data_fine_tuning] USAGE:[PIP,API] INTEGRATION_NOTES:MIT commercial use; KronosPredictor callable from server-side tRPC; directly upgrades backtestEngine and alphaFactors with foundation model predictions; fine-tuning for specific markets (A-share/HK/US). URL:https://github.com/shiyu-coder/Kronos', 'Kronos,K线基础模型,OHLCV,量化预测,GPT架构,45交易所,A股港股美股', 'workflow', 5, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810032, '[资源存档] L028 股票智能分析系统 daily_stock_analysis', 'CATEGORY:FINANCIAL_DATA | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:25400 | FORKS:26300 | LANG:Python | CORE:AI LLM-based intelligent stock analysis for A-share/HK/US markets generating daily decision dashboards (one-sentence conclusion/precise entry-exit levels/operation checklist) pushed to WeChat/Feishu/Telegram/Discord/Slack/email. CAPABILITIES:[decision_dashboard_one_sentence_entry_exit_checklist,multi_dimensional_analysis_technical_chip_sentiment_realtime,global_market_A_HK_US,market_strategy_A_share_three_stage_US_Regime,agent_stock_query_multi_round_QA,multi_channel_notification_push,GitHub_Actions_zero_cost_deployment,AI_backtest_validation,built_in_trading_discipline] USAGE:[CLI,API,WEB_APP,DOCKER] INTEGRATION_NOTES:MIT commercial use; decision dashboard format applicable to TARGET_SYSTEM analysis output design; trading discipline constraints applicable to AI output guardrails; GitHub Actions pattern for scheduled analysis. NOTE:Forks(26k)>>Stars(25k) indicates large private deployment base. URL:https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis', '股票智能分析,决策看板,A股港股美股,交易纪律,多渠道推送,GitHub Actions,量化', 'workflow', 5, NULL, NOW());
